untranslatable_reason: Commodity Channel Index (CCI) is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The source document states 'CCI generates entry signal (specific threshold not disclosed in excerpt)' and 'Exit date determined by trading rule (specific rule not disclosed in excerpt)' — exact thresholds and exit logic are undisclosed. CCI would need to be added as an allowed indicator to translate this rule accurately.
translation_notes: Signal is for NIFTY options with both long puts (42 trades) and long calls (26 trades) totaling 68 trades over 10-year backtest period (2008-10-01 to 2018-09-30). Slippage cost is 10% per the source text. CCI-based entry/exit mechanism cannot be properly encoded without CCI as an allowed indicator.
